topics.topic_en: Agile Requirements Determination and User Stories
topics.query_en: Agile requirements gathering user stories systems analysis
topics.query_ar: تجميع المتطلبات في أجايل Agile Requirements شرح
topics.reason: Transitioning from traditional, heavily documented requirements to iterative, user-centric Agile methodologies requires a significant shift in mindset.

topics.query_en: Formal vs informal systems document analysis systems design
topics.query_ar: الأنظمة الرسمية وغير الرسمية تحليل النظم
topics.reason: It is difficult for students to conceptualize and identify unwritten, informal workarounds compared to explicitly documented organizational rules.

topics.query_ar: شرح Nominal Group Technique NGT هندسة البرمجيات
